clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Standardized BP classification and treatment pathway based on ACC/AHA COR 1 (STRONG) recommendation with Level C-EO (Expert Opinion) evidence
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Initial BP assessment, treatment initiation, medication titration, follow-up scheduling
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: BP category assignment + treatment pathway (lifestyle, medication initiation, follow-up timing)

navigationPath.purpose: Display BP category (Normal, Elevated, Stage 1, Stage 2)
For Stage 1: Check DM, CKD, or PREVENT risk ≥7.5%
Promote lifestyle therapy at all thresholds (COR 1)
Determine medication initiation based on clinical context
Schedule follow-up based on BP goal achievement
Consider intensification if goal not met

rules: Classify BP into category based on systolic and diastolic thresholds
At all thresholds: Promote lifestyle therapy (COR 1)
If Normal BP: Schedule reassessment in 1 year
If Elevated BP: Schedule reassessment in 3-6 months (COR 1)
If Stage 1: Check clinical context (DM, CKD, or PREVENT risk ≥7.5%)
Stage 1 with NO risk factors: Reassess in 3-6 months, continue monitoring if BP remains Stage 1
Stage 1 with YES risk factors: Initiate BP-lowering medication AND reassess in 1 month (COR 1)
If Stage 2: Initiate BP-lowering medication AND reassess in 1 month (COR 1)
After medication start: If BP goal MET → reassess in 3-6 months (COR 1)
After medication start: If BP goal NOT MET → consider intensification of therapy while optimizing adherence

categories.name: Stage 1 Hypertension
categories.action: Check DM, CKD, or PREVENT risk ≥7.5%

medicationInitiated.description: True for Stage 1 with risk factors or Stage 2

thresholds.sbp: Not applicable for this COR/LOE combination
thresholds.dbp: Not applicable for this COR/LOE combination

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Follow COR 1 STRONG recommendation for BP management
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Based on BP category and goal achievement: 1 year (Normal), 3-6 months (Elevated or goal met), 1 month (medication initiation)
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm BP category with repeat measurement before treatment change
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag if BP goal not met after medication start for therapy intensification review
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log BP category, risk factors, medication initiation, follow-up schedule, and goal achievement
